text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Are they cheering for me? I guess the days of
huddling up in front of the TV to watch this race
while stuffing my face are finished...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's the Arima Kinen, Trainer! Everything we've
worked for up until now has led to this!
choice_data_list: Let's give it all we've got!
Let's give it all we've got!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Right! I used to think that luck was the only thing
that could take me this far...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But luck alone will never be enough! It's because
of all the connections I've made. That's why I'm
here.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You, my trainer, who worked so hard to nurture
me. All the fans who cheered me on...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka, my classmates, my departed sister, and
so many others!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru looks up at the sky
resolutely.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All those bright lights have gathered into one
brilliant beam, leading me here. Today, I won't be
asking the gods for help...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Today... I am Shiraoki! I'm the Lucky-musume who will bring joy to all!
